prompt: Create a Node.js script in my project that converts an HTML string to a DOCX file. I want a reusable function I can call from other scripts.

assertions.name: script-created
assertions.description: A script or module file was created for DOCX generation

assertions.name: exports-function
assertions.description: Script exports a reusable function (not just inline code)

assertions.name: writes-file
assertions.description: Script writes the buffer to a .docx file using fs.writeFileSync or fs.writeFile

assertions.name: has-example
assertions.description: Script includes example HTML content to demonstrate usage
